prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次约3261→4957→6565→11329→3225，2024年大幅后移至11329名后，2025年因新高考改革（物理+化学选科要求）位次大幅回升至3225名，波动剧烈；2025年基准约3225名；本省理科/物理类计划2021–2022年3人，2023–2024年6人，2025年5人；2026年计划大幅扩至12人（含电气类10人、材料类2人），较2025年扩招140%，竞争显著缓解，位次数字预计大幅增大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜2021年第43名→2026年第60名，近年排名略有下滑但仍属全国百强；2026年声誉评价为「明显负面」，主要涉及学术不端（院长论文造假、教师数据伪造等）及学校管理回应事件，可能小幅降低报考热度；抖音热度排名第48位（较热），短视频曝光一般；未见明显投档断档记录；社会学A、世界史A-，与招生专业（电气类、材料类）无直接对应，但学校综合类定位对理科考生仍有吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气类（聚焦集成电路与高端装备方向）属高热推荐专业，社会热度持续升温；材料类属一般观望/分化方向。本省2026年普通高考考生总数约154000人，较2025年物理类83716人增长约84%，竞争大幅加剧。；上海大学位于上海市，地域吸引力强；2025年该校在内蒙古招生25人（占全国总招生1.53%），2026年计划增至15人（物理类12+历史类3），占比略有上升。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次3225名、2026年计划大幅扩招140%（位次数字增大效应显著）、本省考生总数大幅增长约84%（竞争加剧效应）、声誉负面小幅降温，扩招效应远大于竞争加剧效应，预计位次大幅后移；预测最低位次约5884名，区间5384–6384名。

一档（最难进）
- 电气类（聚焦集成电路与高端装备）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:

major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science/physics category was approximately 3261 → 4957 → 6565 → 11329 → 3225. In 2024, it significantly dropped to after 11329, and in 2025, due to the new college entrance examination reform (physics + chemistry subject requirements), the ranking rebounded sharply to 3225, showing drastic fluctuations. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 3225. The provincial science/physics enrollment plan was 3 students in 2021–2022, 6 students in 2023–2024, and 5 students in 2025. In 2026, the plan greatly expands to 12 students (including 10 in Electrical Category and 2 in Materials Category), a 140% increase compared to 2025, significantly easing competition, and the ranking number is expected to increase substantially.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 and Double First-Class university. On the Soft Science main ranking, it was 43rd in 2021 → 60th in 2026, with a slight decline in recent years but still among the top 100 nationally. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is 'clearly negative', mainly involving academic misconduct (dean's paper fabrication, teacher data forgery, etc.) and the university's management response incidents, which may slightly reduce application enthusiasm. Douyin popularity ranking is 48th (relatively popular), with general short video exposure. No obvious admission cutoff gaps are recorded. Sociology is rated A, World History A-, which do not directly correspond to the enrollment majors (Electrical Category, Materials Category), but the university's comprehensive positioning still attracts science candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Electrical Category (focusing on integrated circuits and high-end equipment) is a highly recommended popular major, with continuously rising social popularity. The Materials Category is generally in a wait-and-see/differentiated direction. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in the province is approximately 154,000, an increase of about 84% compared to 83,716 in the physics category in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. Shanghai University is located in Shanghai, with strong regional appeal. In 2025, the university enrolled 25 students in Inner Mongolia (accounting for 1.53% of total national enrollment), and in 2026, the plan increases to 15 students (12 in physics category + 3 in history category), with a slight increase in proportion.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 3225, the significant enrollment expansion of 140% in 2026 (effect of increasing ranking number), the substantial increase of about 84% in the total number of provincial candidates (competition intensification effect), and the slight cooling effect from negative reputation, the expansion effect far outweighs the competition intensification effect, so the ranking is expected to shift significantly backward. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 5884, with a range of 5384–6384.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Electrical Category (focusing on integrated circuits and high-end equipment).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Materials Category (focusing on advanced materials and environmental protection).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 5384–6384, it is recommended to prioritize the Electrical Category as the main application (Tier 1 sprint), with the Materials Category as a safety choice. If your ranking is better than the lower limit of the range (<5384), you can focus on sprinting for the flagship Electrical Category major. If your ranking is worse than the upper limit (>6384), consider other universities.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 1041 → 838 → 634 → 1914 → 923. In 2024, it significantly dropped to 1914th place, but in 2025, due to the new college entrance examination reform (history + no subject restrictions), the ranking rebounded to 923rd. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 923rd. The provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plan was 2 students from 2021 to 2024, increasing to 3 students in 2025. The 2026 plan is 3 students (Humanities and Sciences Experimental Class), unchanged from 2025, with no changes in the plan.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class; on the Soft Science main ranking, it was 43rd in 2021 → 60th in 2026, with a slight decline in recent years but still among the top 100 nationally. The 2026 reputation evaluation is 'clearly negative', mainly involving academic misconduct incidents, which may slightly reduce application enthusiasm. Douyin popularity ranking is 48th (relatively popular), with average short video exposure. No obvious record of enrollment gaps. Sociology is rated A, World History A-, highly corresponding to the enrollment major (Humanities and Sciences Experimental Class includes Sociology, Law, History, etc.). The A-level Sociology discipline has strong appeal to liberal arts applicants.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Humanities and Sciences Experimental Class covers Sociology (A), Law (recommended/relatively popular), Journalism and Communication (clearly discouraged), etc., with overall popularity diverging. In 2026, the total number of ordinary college entrance examination students in the province is approximately 154,000. Based on the recent history category proportion of about 28%, the number of history category students is approximately 43,120, an increase of about 32% compared to 32,644 history category students in 2025, intensifying competition. Shanghai University is located in Shanghai, with strong regional appeal. In 2025, the university enrolled 25 students in Inner Mongolia (accounting for 1.53% of the national total enrollment), and in 2026, the plan is 15 students, with a slight decrease in proportion.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 923rd, the 2026 plan unchanged, the provincial history category student increase of about 32% (competition intensification effect), the slight cooling due to negative reputation, and the appeal of the A-level Sociology discipline, the ranking is expected to shift slightly backward. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 953rd, with a range of 453rd to 1453rd.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Humanities and Sciences Experimental Class (including Sociology, Social Work, Law, Intellectual Property, Network and New Media, History).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- No other majors currently.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Within the predicted ranking range of 453rd to 1453rd, the Humanities and Sciences Experimental Class is the only enrollment major. It is recommended that applicants with rankings better than the lower limit of the range (<453rd) can apply boldly, those with rankings in the middle of the range can fill in steadily, and those with rankings worse than the upper limit of the range (>1453rd) should be cautious.
